content: Fix useCarByVin + VinSearchDropdown to never set error to a non-string value
Rewrite SimilarCars to fetch /api/public/featured (exclude current VIN, paginate)
Rewrite CarCard to accept real `data` prop and become a Link to /cars/<vin>
Verify Similar Cars click → navigates to proper /cars/<VIN> with real data
Verify no more React crash on bad inputs in header search
